posts.author: SSSuu (Rion Suzuki)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello,
I noticed that currently, Gantt charts aren’t supported on mobile devices. It would be really helpful if we could view Gantt charts on our phones too.
I understand that many of us are often on the go and need to check project timelines quickly. Having this feature would make it so much easier to stay on top of things, even when we’re not at our desks.
Is this something that’s on the roadmap?

What are you trying to achieve

Enable the display of Gantt charts on mobile phones.
